Cnl.Name: BeeMS Master 0 - GLV IL control status
BeeMS Master 0 - GLV IL user desired
BeeMS Master 0 - GLV IL user override
BeeMS Master 0 - GLV IL software desired
BeeMS Master 0 - MCHS pack max A
BeeMS Master 0 - MCHS pack max A surge
BeeMS Master 0 - MCHS surge max time mS
BeeMS Master 0 - MCHS sampling period mS
BeeMS Master 0 - MCHS pack current mA
BeeMS Master 0 - Reset Master Board safety status
